name: Beverly Jewelry
description_short: Beverly Diamonds is a fine jewelry retailer offering diamonds, lab diamonds, and moissanite pieces with flexible financing options and free shipping.
description_long: Beverly Diamonds has operated as a fine jewelry retailer since 1999, positioning itself as a provider of accessible luxury jewelry for consumers seeking engagement rings, bridal sets, and everyday pieces. The company sells natural diamonds, lab-grown diamonds, and moissanite jewelry across multiple categories including engagement rings, earrings, necklaces, bracelets, and men's jewelry, with prices ranging from under $1,200 to over $8,000 depending on specifications. Beverly Diamonds distinguishes itself through a 4.7/5 customer rating, free insured shipping, 30-day returns, free resizing, and promotional offers like free diamond studs with purchases over $1,500. The company emphasizes ethical sourcing, uses 18k gold vermeil construction (2.5 microns thick over sterling silver), and offers custom jewelry design services where customers can work with craftsmen to create personalized pieces. The primary product offering is fine jewelry sales, though the company also provides flexible financing options to help customers spread payments over time, which functions as a credit product rather than traditional pawn or collateral-based lending. This financing component, combined with the retail jewelry sales model, positions Beverly Diamonds primarily as a jewelry retailer with ancillary financing rather than as a pawn shop. The company's misclassification as a pawn shop appears incorrect—Beverly Diamonds does not buy, sell, or lend against jewelry as collateral; it manufactures and sells fine jewelry directly to consumers.
pros: Established brand with 25+ years in business (since 1999)
High customer rating of 4.7/5 stars with multiple service guarantees
Free insured shipping and 30-day return policy reduce purchase risk
Transparent product specifications including diamond grading and gold composition details
Custom jewelry design service allows personalized creation with expert craftsmen
Flexible financing options available to spread payments over time
Multiple jewelry material options including lab diamonds and moissanite for different budgets
cons: Flexible financing terms and APR rates not disclosed on website, requiring application to learn specifics
Prices remain premium even with discounts; entry-level pieces start around $1,100+
Limited transparency on financing partner identity and approval criteria
No information provided about jewelry certification standards or grading verification
Customer service appears phone-only (1-855-456-8334); no chat or email support visible
best_for: Engaged couples and individuals shopping for engagement rings or bridal sets with flexible payment options
Consumers seeking lab-grown or moissanite alternatives to natural diamonds at moderate savings
Gift-buyers looking for high-quality fine jewelry with guaranteed returns and free resizing
diagnosis: Beverly Diamonds is best for consumers with sufficient credit or financing approval seeking to purchase fine jewelry with payment flexibility and strong consumer protections. The primary caveat is that flexible financing terms are not disclosed upfront, requiring customers to apply and potentially face rejection, and APR rates could be significantly higher than traditional credit products depending on the financing partner used.
services: Natural diamond jewelry sales and shopping
Free insured shipping within the U.S.
Men's jewelry collection (pendants, bracelets, chains, wedding bands)
Promotional offers and discounts (up to 70% off stated)
